rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Third Amended Complaint With Prejudice And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Statutory Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 12, 2013, line 9. - DEFENDANTS EAST WEST BANK TREASURY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND EAST WEST BANKS' Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Third Amended Complaint With Prejudice And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Statutory Costs. EAST WEST BANK TREASURY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND EAST WEST BANKS' Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Third Amended Complaint With Prejudice And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Statutory Costs is Denied. Plaintiff's counsel has sought relief from his oversight in filing the Third Amended Complaint late. Defendant has failed to show prejudice resulted from this oversight. In light of California's strong policy for deciding cases on the merit, the Third Amended Complaint will not be dismissed. = (D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHELJIVE GUEVARA VS. JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Pltff To Respond To Def'S Demand For Non-Destructive Inspection, Sampling, And Testing Per Ccp 2031.010(C) Of 2010, 2011 And 2012 Handwritten Spreadsheets And Grant Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 12, 2013, line 11. - DEFENDANTS JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ AND ROGELIO CARDONAS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Defendants Demand For Non-Destructive Inspection, Sampling, And Testing Per Ccp 2031.010(C) Of 2010, 2011 And 2012 Handwritten Spreadsheets And Grant Monetary Sanctions. JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ AND ROGELIO CARDONAS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Defendants Demand For Non-Destructive Inspection, Sampling, And Testing Per Ccp 2031.010(C) Of 2010, 2011 And 2012 Handwritten Spreadsheets And Grant Monetary Sanctions is Granted. It is reasonably likely that the requested spreadsheet, at a minimum, would lead to discoverable information. No sanctions are awarded. = (D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN VS. WILLIAM EERKOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 12, 2013, line 13. - DEFENDANT WILLIAM EEKHOF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. WILLIAM EEKHOF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted. Defendant failed to respond due to inadvertence and excusable neglect. Additionally, Plaintiff did not submit evidence supporting that Plaintiff was personally served. = (D501/REQ)
